_comment: L6 Orchestration — routing, fallback chain, and the uniform tool schema. Backend-independent (R3): switching models must not change identity or tools.

fallback_chain.behavior: Answer from local memory + handle local tasks (timers, recall). State plainly what needs connectivity. Never hang or brick (Mycroft lesson).

tool_schema.name: memory_search
tool_schema.description: Search the memory vault for notes about a person, project, preference, or decision. Returns full notes with their links. Call only when continuity/context is needed.

tool_schema.name: remember
tool_schema.description: Record something the Owner asked you to remember (a fact, preference, or standing rule). It takes effect from the next turn and is merged into a durable vault note. Record ONLY what the Owner explicitly states — never speculation. Pass an `entity` to group it (e.g. 'units', 'schedule').

tool_schema.name: forget
tool_schema.description: Remove or correct something previously remembered. Use when the Owner retracts or changes a preference/fact (e.g. 'forget my old address'), or right after they correct you. Pass the fact text and/or the `entity` it was filed under.

tool_schema.name: get_time
tool_schema.description: Get the current local date and time.

tool_schema.name: atlas_status
tool_schema.description: Introspect ATLAS itself — its 7 layers, scheduled jobs, connectors, current model/routing, memory, version, and capabilities. ALWAYS call this when the Owner asks anything about ATLAS itself (e.g. 'what can you do', 'what are your scheduled jobs', 'which model are you using', 'what connectors do you have', 'what's your status'). Never answer questions about ATLAS from guesswork.

area.description: Which subsystem to report on. Default 'overview'.

tool_schema.name: calendar_list_events
tool_schema.description: List upcoming calendar events in a date range.

tool_schema.name: calendar_create_event
tool_schema.description: Create a calendar event. Confirm briefly after.

tool_schema.name: email_draft
tool_schema.description: Draft an email (saved as draft, NOT sent).

tool_schema.name: email_send
tool_schema.description: Send an email. DESTRUCTIVE — requires explicit verbal confirmation before calling.

tool_schema.name: web_search
tool_schema.description: Search the web for current information. Summarize results with sources.

risk_policy.WRITE: allowed per settings; confirm briefly after
risk_policy.DESTRUCTIVE: ALWAYS requires explicit verbal confirmation before execution
